card_description: Joseph Campbell is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 7 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Second Advent" as a "Secret Kingdom" existing in eternity while the "usurper" (Satan/Empire) remains in control of linear time."
